about our sustainability practices?</span><!--]--></h2><!----><!----><!----></div><div class="text-block__right-section" data-v-1b4f984d><div class="text-block__text" data-v-1b4f984d></div><a style="-webkit-mask-image:url('/icons/forward.svg');" data-v-8f0c7409></span></span></a><!----></div></div></section></div><!--]--><div class="accordion" data-v-804cbc3c><!--[--><div data-v-804cbc3c><div data-v-804cbc3c><div class="accordion-base accordion-base--animate" data-v-874f99f5 data-v-9cf87d2b><button aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-base__header" id="accordion-base-header-630583" aria-controls="accordion-base-panel-630583" data-v-9cf87d2b><!--[--><div class="accordion__title" data-v-874f99f5>How do I know which size to choose?</div><!--]--><div aria-hidden="true" data-v-9cf87d2b><!--[--><div class="accordion__icon" data-v-874f99f5><span data-v-874f99f5></span><span data-v-874f99f5></span></div><!--]--></div></button><section class="accordion-base__panel" aria-hidden="true" data-animate="true" aria-labelledby="accordion-base-header-630583" data-v-9cf87d2b><div data-v-9cf87d2b><!--[--><div class="accordion__content" data-v-874f99f5><!--[--><!--[--><div><p class="rich-text--paragraph">We want your feet to be as comfortable as they are colorful! Most of our socks come in our standard adult sizes.<span> </span>However, specific items like kids' socks, underwear, or pool sliders may vary. To be absolutely sure, <span>check our </span><a href="/us/faq/sizes" target="_self" class="rich-text--link"><span><u>size guide</u></span></a><span> to pick the perfect fit.</span></p></div><!--]--><!--]--></div><!--]--></div></section><!--[--><div class="accordion__divider" data-v-874f99f5></div><!--]--></div></div></div><div data-v-804cbc3c><div data-v-804cbc3c><div class="accordion-base accordion-base--animate" data-v-874f99f5 data-v-9cf87d2b><button aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-base__header" id="accordion-base-header-164103" aria-controls="accordion-base-panel-164103" data-v-9cf87d2b><!--[--><div class="accordion__title" data-v-874f99f5>How do I keep my Happy Socks looking vibrant?</div><!--]--><div aria-hidden="true" data-v-9cf87d2b><!--[--><div class="accordion__icon" data-v-874f99f5><span data-v-874f99f5></span><span data-v-874f99f5></span></div><!--]--></div></button><section class="accordion-base__panel" aria-hidden="true" data-animate="true" aria-labelledby="accordion-base-header-164103" data-v-9cf87d2b><div data-v-9cf87d2b><!--[--><div class="accordion__content" data-v-874f99f5><!--[--><!--[--><div><p class="rich-text--paragraph">To keep those colors popping and that happiness fresh, we recommend washing your socks <b>inside out</b>. Generally, we suggest a machine wash at 40°C (104°F). Avoid bleaching or ironing (your socks don't like the heat!) and, if possible, keep them out of the tumble dryer to preserve the fibres and keep them fit for longer. Check out our detailed <a href="https://www.happysocks.com/faq/product-information?scrollTo=care-instructions" target="_self" class="rich-text--link">washing instructions</a>.</p></div><!--]--><!--]--></div><!--]--></div></section><!--[--><div class="accordion__divider" data-v-874f99f5></div><!--]--></div></div></div><div data-v-804cbc3c><div data-v-804cbc3c><div class="accordion-base accordion-base--animate" data-v-874f99f5 data-v-9cf87d2b><button aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-base__header" id="accordion-base-header-5130" aria-controls="accordion-base-panel-5130" data-v-9cf87d2b><!--[--><div class="accordion__title" data-v-874f99f5>Are Happy Socks suitable for gifting?</div><!--]--><div aria-hidden="true" data-v-9cf87d2b><!--[--><div class="accordion__icon" data-v-874f99f5><span data-v-874f99f5></span><span data-v-874f99f5></span></div><!--]--></div></button><section class="accordion-base__panel" aria-hidden="true" data-animate="true" aria-labelledby="accordion-base-header-5130" data-v-9cf87d2b><div data-v-9cf87d2b><!--[--><div class="accordion__content" data-v-874f99f5><!--[--><!--[--><div><p class="rich-text--paragraph">Absolutely! Happy Socks were born to be gifted. Whether you are browsing single pairs, multi-packs, or special edition boxes, our products are designed to spark joy. If you are looking for the ultimate present, check out our dedicated <b>Gift Sets</b>, which come in beautiful, pre-designed boxes ready to hand over to your favorite person (or to treat yourself!).</p></div><!--]--><!--]--></div><!--]--></div></section><!--[--><div class="accordion__divider" data-v-874f99f5></div><!--]--></div></div></div><div data-v-804cbc3c><div data-v-804cbc3c><div class="accordion-base accordion-base--animate" data-v-874f99f5 data-v-9cf87d2b><button aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-base__header" id="accordion-base-header-647633" aria-controls="accordion-base-panel-647633" data-v-9cf87d2b><!--[--><div class="accordion__title" data-v-874f99f5>What if I change my mind or the fit isn't right?</div><!--]--><div aria-hidden="true" data-v-9cf87d2b><!--[--><div class="accordion__icon" data-v-874f99f5><span data-v-874f99f5></span><span data-v-874f99f5></span></div><!--]--></div></button><section class="accordion-base__panel" aria-hidden="true" data-animate="true" aria-labelledby="accordion-base-header-647633" data-v-9cf87d2b><div data-v-9cf87d2b><!--[--><div class="accordion__content" data-v-874f99f5><!--[--><!--[--><div><p class="rich-text--paragraph">We want you to be 100% happy with your purchase. If you aren't completely satisfied, you have a specific window (usually 30 days) to return unworn, unwashed items with their original labels and packaging intact. Please visit our <a href="/us/faq/returns" target="_self" class="rich-text--link"><b>Returns</b></a> page for the full step-by-step instructions on how to send items back to us.</p></div><!--]--><!--]--></div><!--]--></div></section><!--[--><div class="accordion__divider" data-v-874f99f5></div><!--]--></div></div></div><!--]--></div></main></main><!----><!----><span
